_meta.description: Comprehensive feature list for incremental implementation. Each feature should be implementable and testable in a single Claude Code session. CRITICAL: It is unacceptable to remove or edit tests because this could lead to missing or buggy functionality. Only mark a feature as passes=true after its tests pass.

features.description: Project scaffolding: create directory structure, __init__.py files, .gitignore
steps: Create scripts/, prompts/, tests/, tests/fixtures/, output/ directories
Create __init__.py in scripts/ and tests/
Create .gitignore with Python, .venv, output/, *.pdf, .env entries
Create output/.gitkeep
Verify: ls confirms all directories exist

features.description: Move v0.16_alpha prompt files into prompts/ directory
steps: Copy coordinator.md to prompts/coordinator.md
Copy phase1-3 files to prompts/
Copy references/ directory to prompts/references/
Verify: all 8 prompt files exist in prompts/

features.description: config.py: Token management with env var loading and stock code validation
steps: Create scripts/config.py with get_token() and validate_stock_code()
Support A-share (XXXXXX.SH/.SZ) and HK (XXXXX.HK) formats
Write test_config.py: test token loading, test stock code validation
Run pytest tests/test_config.py -- all pass

features.description: requirements.txt and init.sh setup script
steps: Create scripts/requirements.txt with tushare, pandas, pdfplumber, requests, pytest
Create init.sh with venv setup, pip install, token check, test run
chmod +x init.sh
Run bash init.sh -- completes without errors

features.description: CLI argument parser for tushare_collector.py (skeleton)
steps: Create scripts/tushare_collector.py with argparse skeleton
Arguments: --code (required), --token, --output, --extra-fields, --dry-run
Run with --dry-run -- prints parsed args correctly
Run with no args -- shows help with error

features.description: CLI argument parser for pdf_preprocessor.py (skeleton)
steps: Create scripts/pdf_preprocessor.py with argparse skeleton
Arguments: --pdf (required), --output, --verbose, --dry-run
Run with --dry-run -- prints args correctly

features.description: Test fixtures: create mock Tushare API response files
steps: Create tests/fixtures/mock_tushare_responses/ directory
Create mock JSON files: stock_basic, daily_basic, income, balancesheet, cashflow, dividend, weekly for 600887
Create conftest.py with fixture that loads mock data by endpoint name
Verify: pytest --collect-only shows fixtures

features.description: Markdown output utility: format_number(), format_table(), format_header()
steps: Create helper functions for markdown output formatting
format_number(): divide by 1e6, format with commas to 2 decimals
format_table(): generate markdown table with right-alignment for numbers
Write tests: test format_number(96886000000) == '96,886.00'
Run pytest -- all format tests pass

features.description: Check if PDF already exists locally before download
steps: Add check_local_pdf(stock_code, year, search_dir) function
Search patterns: {code}_{year}_*.pdf, *{code}*{year}*年报*.pdf
Write test: create temp file matching pattern, verify detection
Write test: verify returns None when no match

features.description: Document snowball-report-downloader invocation in coordinator prompt
steps: Update prompts/coordinator.md Phase 0 section with download command syntax
Add fallback instruction: if download fails, set pdf_available=false
Verify: coordinator.md contains Phase 0 block

features.description: PDF validation after download (magic bytes, size check)
steps: Add validate_pdf(filepath) function to config.py
Check %PDF magic bytes and file size > 100KB
Write tests with fake PDF header and empty file
Run pytest -- all pass

features.description: Update coordinator to handle 3 PDF scenarios (exists/download/skip)
steps: Update prompts/coordinator.md with decision tree
Scenario 1: User uploaded PDF -> use directly
Scenario 2: Auto-download -> validate -> use
Scenario 3: Download failed -> set no-PDF mode
Add AskUserQuestion template for PDF choice

features.description: TushareClient class: initialize connection with token and rate limiting
steps: Add TushareClient class to tushare_collector.py
Constructor: set tushare token, create pro_api()
Add rate_limit decorator: time.sleep(0.3) between calls
Add _safe_call() with retry logic (max 3 retries)
Write test with mock: verify rate limiting and retry

features.description: Section 1: Basic company info (stock_basic + daily_basic endpoints)
steps: Add get_basic_info(ts_code) method
Extract name, industry, exchange, list_date, pe_ttm, pb, total_mv, circ_mv
Format as section 1 markdown table
Write test with mock data: verify correct field extraction

features.description: Section 2: Market data (current price, 52-week range)
steps: Add get_market_data(ts_code) method
Get latest close price and calculate 52-week high/low
Format as section 2 markdown
Write test: verify 52-week range calculation

features.description: Section 3: Five-year consolidated income statement (report_type=1)
steps: Add get_income(ts_code, report_type=1) method
Fetch 5 years of annual income data
Extract: revenue, oper_cost, n_income_attr_p, minority_gain, dt_eps
All amounts / 1e6, formatted with commas
Write test: verify amount conversion and 5-year column ordering

features.description: Section 3P: Five-year parent-company income statement (report_type=4)
steps: Add get_income_parent(ts_code) using report_type=4
Extract parent-only fields: revenue, n_income, oper_profit
Format as section 3P markdown
Write test: verify report_type=4 is passed to API

features.description: Section 4: Five-year consolidated balance sheet (report_type=1)
steps: Add get_balance_sheet(ts_code, report_type=1) method
Extract: total_assets, total_liab, money_cap, accounts_receiv, inventories, goodwill, contract_liab, adv_receipts, lt_borr, st_borr
Amounts / 1e6
Write test: verify interest-bearing debt and contract_liab fields

features.description: Section 4P: Five-year parent-company balance sheet (report_type=4)
steps: Add get_balance_sheet_parent(ts_code) using report_type=4
Extract: money_cap, lt_eqt_invest, st_borr, lt_borr
Format as section 4P markdown
Write test: verify parent-specific fields

features.description: Section 5: Five-year cash flow statement
steps: Add get_cashflow(ts_code) method
Extract: n_cashflow_act (OCF), n_cashflow_inv_act, n_cashflow_fnc_act, c_paid_invest (capex), prov_depr_assets (D&A)
Calculate FCF = OCF - |Capex|
Write test: verify FCF calculation

features.description: Section 6: Dividend history
steps: Add get_dividends(ts_code) method
Extract: cash_div_tax, stk_div, record_date, ex_date per year
Calculate total dividend = cash_div_tax * total_share
Write test: verify DPS extraction and total calculation

features.description: Section 11 + Appendix A: 10-year weekly price history
steps: Add get_weekly_prices(ts_code) method
Fetch 10 years of weekly OHLCV data
Calculate 10yr high/low with dates, annual summary
Format section 11 + Appendix A
Write test: verify 10-year range and annual aggregation

features.description: Section 12: Key financial indicators (fina_indicator endpoint)
steps: Add get_fina_indicators(ts_code) method
Extract: roe, grossprofit_margin, netprofit_margin, rd_exp_to_revenue
Format as section 12 markdown (5 years)
Write test: verify ROE and margin fields

features.description: Section 9: Business segment data (fina_mainbz_ts endpoint)
steps: Add get_segments(ts_code) method
Extract revenue and profit by segment
Handle empty data gracefully
Write test: verify segment breakdown

features.description: Section 7 (partial): Top 10 holders + audit info
steps: Add get_holders(ts_code) and get_audit(ts_code) methods
Extract top 10 shareholder names and percentages
Extract audit opinion type
Write tests for holder and audit parsing

features.description: available_fields.json: Generate field inventory from all endpoints
steps: After calling each endpoint, capture all column names
Write to available_fields.json: {endpoint: [fields]}
Write test: verify JSON structure

features.description: Extra-fields mode: --extra-fields for on-demand field fetching
steps: Parse 'endpoint.field_name' format
Fetch specified fields and output to _extra.md
Write test: verify field parsing logic

features.description: Full data_pack_market.md assembly: combine all sections
steps: Add assemble_data_pack() combining all get_* methods
Write complete file with header (stock code, time, completeness)
Include all sections, leave placeholders for Agent-filled ones
Write test: verify all section headers present

features.description: yfinance fallback: degrade gracefully when Tushare endpoint fails
steps: Wrap each call in try/except
On failure, attempt yfinance equivalent
Tag fallback data with '来源: yfinance (降级)'
Write test: simulate failure, verify fallback triggers

features.description: Warnings generation: auto-detect anomalies during collection
steps: Add WarningsCollector class
Detect: data missing, >300% YoY change, audit risk, governance risk
Format as section 13 in data_pack_market.md
Write test: inject anomalous data, verify warning

features.description: Update Phase 1 prompt: remove script-covered sections, keep Agent tasks
steps: Edit prompts/phase1_数据采集.md to remove sections 1-6, 9, 11, 12
Keep sections 7, 8, 10 (management, industry, MD&A)
Add instruction: read data_pack_market.md first, fill missing sections
Verify: prompt contains only Agent-required sections

features.description: Section 5 (Rf): WebSearch for risk-free rate
steps: Add search queries for A-share Rf: '中国十年期国债收益率 最新'
Add fallback query: 'China 10 year government bond yield'
Verify: prompt contains Rf search instructions

features.description: Section 7 (rest): Management and governance WebSearch queries
steps: Note top10_holders and audit come from script
Keep WebSearch for: CEO/CFO tenure, fraud, pledge/reduction, buyback
Add search query templates with {company_name} placeholders

features.description: Section 8: Industry and competition WebSearch queries
steps: Update prompt with search query templates
Include conditional 8.4 (raw milk prices for dairy)
Add trigger condition based on industry classification

features.description: Section 10: MD&A summary WebSearch queries
steps: Update with bilingual search queries
4 targets: operating review, guidance, capital allocation, risk factors
Each limited to 200 chars of original text

features.description: Section 13: Agent-generated warnings appended to script warnings
steps: Instruct Agent to READ existing section 13
Append new warnings from WebSearch findings
Do NOT overwrite script-generated warnings

features.description: PDF text extraction: pdfplumber page-by-page with page index
steps: Add extract_all_pages(pdf_path) function
Return list of (page_number, text) tuples
Handle encrypted and scan-only PDFs
Write test: verify page count and error handling

features.description: Keyword library: SECTION_KEYWORDS for 5 target sections
steps: Define SECTION_KEYWORDS dict for P2/P3/P4/P6/P13
Include simplified Chinese, traditional Chinese, and English keywords
Write test: verify all 5 sections have >= 3 keywords each

features.description: Keyword matching: locate sections by scanning all pages
steps: Add find_section_pages(pages_text, section_keywords) function
Prefer matches in second half of document (financial statements)
Return dict: {section_id: [matched_page_numbers]}
Write test: mock pages with keywords, verify detection

features.description: Context extraction: target page +/- 1 page buffer, truncate to 2000 chars
steps: Add extract_section_context() function
Combine (page-1, page, page+1) text
Truncate at sentence boundary
Write test: verify 3-page combination and truncation

features.description: JSON output: write pdf_sections.json with 5 sections + metadata
steps: Add write_output() function
JSON: {P2: text|null, P3: ..., metadata: {pdf_path, total_pages, time, count}}
Write test: verify JSON is valid and null for unfound sections

features.description: Main pipeline: chain extraction -> matching -> context -> output
steps: Implement main() chaining all steps
Add verbose mode with progress messages
Handle errors: PDF not found, too small, no sections found
Write test: end-to-end with mock pipeline

features.description: Traditional Chinese keyword support for HK annual reports
steps: Add traditional Chinese variants to SECTION_KEYWORDS
Write test: verify traditional Chinese keywords match

features.description: PyMuPDF fallback for garbled pdfplumber extraction
steps: Add fallback_extract_pymupdf() function
Detect garbled text: >30% non-CJK/ASCII characters
Add pymupdf to requirements as optional
Write test: verify garbled text detection heuristic

features.description: Table-aware extraction: preserve table structures as markdown
steps: Use pdfplumber extract_tables() for pages with tables
Convert to markdown format within extracted text
Write test: verify table detection

features.description: Section priority scoring: prefer financial notes over table of contents
steps: Score by heading context, page position (last 30%), penalize TOC
Write test: verify scoring ranks notes > TOC

features.description: End-to-end validation with real annual report PDF
steps: Run pdf_preprocessor.py on a real annual report
Verify: at least 4/5 sections found
Verify: extracted text contains financial terms
Record results in claude-progress.txt

features.description: Update Phase 2 prompt: reduce 18 items to 5 (P2/P3/P4/P6/P13)
steps: Edit prompts/phase2_PDF解析.md to focus on 5 items
Input: pdf_sections.json (not raw PDF)
Remove P1, P5, P7-P18
Verify: prompt references pdf_sections.json

features.description: Phase 2B output format: data_pack_report.md with 5 sections
steps: Define output template in Phase 2 prompt
Each section: header, table, unit annotation
Add null-handling for missing sections

features.description: P2 restricted cash extraction template
steps: Define output: | Category | Amount (millions) | Notes |
Include total and percentage of total cash
Verify: matches Phase 3 expected input

features.description: P3 AR aging extraction template
steps: Define output: | Aging Bucket | Amount | Percentage |
Include bad debt provision and related party receivables %
Verify: matches Factor 1B module 2 and Factor 3 step 2 input

features.description: P4/P6/P13 extraction templates
steps: P4: top 5 related party transactions table
P6: guarantees + litigation + capital commitments tables
P13: non-recurring items by category
Verify: all match Phase 3 factor reference requirements

features.description: Update Phase 3 prompt for unified units (millions RMB)
steps: Edit prompts/phase3_分析与报告.md
Update unit references: all amounts now in 百万元
Update data source: Tushare Pro instead of yfinance
Add: read available_fields.json if more data needed

features.description: Update Factor 1: parent company data from sections 3P/4P
steps: Edit factor1 reference: module 9 uses 3P/4P directly
Update degradation path if 3P/4P empty
Verify: factor1 reference updated

features.description: Update Factor 2: payout ratio from Tushare dividend data
steps: Update factor2: payout = section 6 dividend / section 3 net income
Both in RMB, no cross-currency issue
Verify: factor2 references correct data_pack sections

features.description: Update Factor 3: contract liability from section 4
steps: Update factor3 step 1: contract_liab and adv_receipts from section 4
No longer need PDF extraction for these
Verify: factor3 step 1 updated

features.description: Update Factor analysis: section 12 provides pre-computed ratios
steps: Factor 1B module 0 references section 12 for ROE, gross margin, net margin
Cross-validate computed vs pre-computed ratios
Verify: module 0 references section 12

features.description: Update all factors: data_pack_report.md now has only 5 items
steps: Update all factor refs to reference only P2/P3/P4/P6/P13
Remove references to P1, P5, P7-P18
Verify: no dangling P-item references

features.description: Checkpoint mechanism with new file structure
steps: Verify checkpoint write paths reference output/ directory
Each factor appends to {company}_{code}_分析报告.md
Ensure progressive disclosure works: load refs from prompts/references/

features.description: Warnings consumption: handle combined script + agent warnings
steps: Section 13 has script-generated (typed) and agent-generated (free-form) warnings
Update Phase 3 step 1 to parse both formats
Verify: phase3 handles mixed warning formats

features.description: Rewrite coordinator: Phase 0->1A->1B->2A->2B->3 flow
steps: Rewrite prompts/coordinator.md execution flow
Phase 1A: run tushare_collector.py (Bash)
Phase 1B: launch Agent for WebSearch
Phase 2A: run pdf_preprocessor.py (Bash, if PDF available)
Phase 2B: launch Agent for extraction (if pdf_sections.json has content)
Phase 3: launch Agent for analysis

features.description: Coordinator: exact Bash commands for Python scripts
steps: Add: python3 scripts/tushare_collector.py --code {ts_code} --output output/data_pack_market.md
Add: python3 scripts/pdf_preprocessor.py --pdf {pdf_path} --output output/pdf_sections.json
Add error checking: verify output files exist after each run

features.description: Coordinator: AskUserQuestion templates for all interaction points
steps: Template 1: holding channel (HK stocks)
Template 2: multi-listed market selection
Template 3: PDF handling (download/skip/upload)
Template 4: ambiguous company name resolution

features.description: Coordinator: no-PDF mode (graceful degradation)
steps: Skip Phase 2A and 2B entirely when pdf_available=false
Phase 3 uses data_pack_market.md only
Use degradation paths for P2/P3/P4/P6/P13 dependent factors
Estimated precision: ~85%

features.description: Coordinator: file path conventions and workspace management
steps: Define all paths relative to project root
Output: output/, prompts: prompts/, references: prompts/references/
Verify: all paths in coordinator are consistent

features.description: Claude Code slash command: .claude/commands/turtle-analysis.md
steps: Create .claude/commands/turtle-analysis.md
Accept argument: stock code or company name
Trigger full pipeline via coordinator
Include usage examples

features.description: Tushare rate limiting and permission errors
steps: Handle 'you do not have permission' error gracefully
Skip endpoint and log warning with severity
Handle HTTP 429 with exponential backoff
Write test: simulate permission error and rate limit

features.description: PDF processing error handling
steps: Handle: PDF not found, encrypted, too small, no sections found
Return clear error messages for each case
Write tests for each error scenario

features.description: Data validation: cross-check financial statement consistency
steps: Add validate_financials() function
Check: total_assets ~= total_liab + equity (1% tolerance)
Check: revenue and net income non-zero
Generate warnings for failed checks

features.description: Hong Kong stock code handling and currency annotation
steps: Detect HK codes: 5-digit or XXXXX.HK format
Convert to Tushare format: 00001.HK
Annotate outputs with HKD currency
Write tests for code conversion and currency annotation

features.description: data_pack_market.md schema validation test
steps: Create test_output_format.py
Verify: all section headers ## 1. through ## 13. present
Verify: tables have correct columns
Verify: amounts use comma-separated format

features.description: pdf_sections.json schema validation test
steps: Validate: required keys P2, P3, P4, P6, P13, metadata
Each value: string or null
Metadata: pdf_path, total_pages, extraction_time, sections_found

features.description: data_pack_report.md output validation
steps: Verify: header with PDF source, fiscal year, page count
Verify: each P-section has content or warning marker
Verify: amounts use consistent unit (百万元)

features.description: End-to-end: tushare_collector.py with live API (600887)
steps: Run: python3 scripts/tushare_collector.py --code 600887.SH
Verify: output >5KB, contains 5 years income data
Verify: contains balance sheet with contract_liab
Record timing in claude-progress.txt
NOTE: requires TUSHARE_TOKEN

features.description: End-to-end: pdf_preprocessor.py with real annual report
steps: Run on a real 600887 annual report PDF
Verify: at least 4/5 sections non-null
Verify: extracted text contains Chinese financial terms
Record accuracy in claude-progress.txt

features.description: End-to-end: full pipeline (Phase 0->1->2->3) on 600887
steps: Execute full pipeline via coordinator
Verify: data_pack_market.md, pdf_sections.json, analysis report generated
Verify: report has all 4 factor scores
Record timing in claude-progress.txt

features.description: README.md: project documentation
steps: Write: overview, prerequisites, installation, usage
Include: architecture diagram, phase flow
Include: environment setup (TUSHARE_TOKEN), example commands
Include: troubleshooting section

features.description: Cowork plugin structure: plugin.json and SKILL.md
steps: Create .claude-plugin/plugin.json
Create skills/turtle-analysis/SKILL.md
Reference prompts/coordinator.md as entry point
Declare dependency on snowball-report-downloader
